implementation.note: Final implementation: 44 endpoints, real JWT auth, persistent RBAC (SQLite), full User CRUD, KB management (CRUD+link+tag+promote+import/export), D3 graph, analytics charts, config editing+hot-reload, audit trail, MCP tool toggle+logs, SSE real-time updates (BR-37), rate limiting middleware (100 req/min/IP). 29/29 tests pass. ~89% AC coverage.
